title: Understanding Python Syntax
summary: Learn the basic syntax and structure of Python code.

sketchBlocks.title: Introduction to Python Syntax
sketchBlocks.bodyMarkdown: In this section, we will explore the fundamental syntax of Python, including variables, data types, and control structures.

quizDraft.title: Print Hello World
quizDraft.prompt: Write a Python program that prints 'Hello, World!' to the console.

help.concept: The print function is used to output data to the console in Python.
help.hint_1: Remember to use parentheses with the print function.
help.hint_2: Make sure to include the text in quotes.

quizDraft.title: Calculate Sum of Two Numbers
quizDraft.prompt: Write a Python function that takes two numbers as arguments and returns their sum.
quizDraft.hint: Focus on the programming task being asked for, not on copying final solution text.

help.concept: Build the solution from the behavior the exercise is testing.
help.hint_1: Think about which steps, functions, or statements are required for the task.
help.hint_2: Construct the solution based on what result the exercise expects, not by repeating exact solution wording.

quizDraft.title: Check Even or Odd
quizDraft.prompt: Write a Python function that checks if a number is even or odd.
quizDraft.hint: Focus on the programming task being asked for, not on copying final solution text.

help.concept: Build the solution from the behavior the exercise is testing.
help.hint_1: Think about which steps, functions, or statements are required for the task.
help.hint_2: Construct the solution based on what result the exercise expects, not by repeating exact solution wording.

quizDraft.title: Complete the Syntax
quizDraft.prompt: Choose the best value for the first missing blank in the statement.
quizDraft.hint: Think about how variables are defined in Python.

help.concept: In Python, variables can be created without a specific keyword, unlike some other programming languages.
help.hint_1: You simply assign a value to a variable name.
help.hint_2: Look for the common way to define a variable in Python.

quizDraft.title: Identify the Correct Syntax
quizDraft.prompt: Which of the following is the correct way to define a function in Python?

help.concept: Functions in Python are defined using the def keyword followed by the function name and parentheses.
help.hint_1: The function definition must end with a colon.
help.hint_2: Check the options for the correct structure.
